summary: Iteration 10 - Payment System Complete E2E Testing. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: 100% - All payment flows verified including Step 5 fix (Proceed to Payment button), UPI tab with QR code, Bank Transfer tab, UTR submission, Cancel/Pay Later, and Admin Payment Settings page.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test registrations and UTR payments created: UTR Test User, Bank Test User, Cancel Test, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system is fully functional. The Step 5 payment bug from iteration 9 has been FIXED - the handleSubmit function now correctly uses server response total_amount for the redirect check. All payment flows work: UPI QR code display, Bank Transfer details, UTR submission via both tabs, Cancel/Pay Later, Admin Payment Settings management.

backend_apis.GET /api/payments/upi-qr: PASSED - Generates base64 QR code with correct UPI URL
backend_apis.POST /api/payments/submit-utr (UPI): PASSED - Creates payment with verification_pending status
backend_apis.POST /api/payments/submit-utr (Bank): PASSED - Creates payment with bank_transfer method
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/payment-settings: PASSED - Returns full settings including razorpay_configured:false
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/payments: PASSED - Returns list of all payments
backend_apis.GET /api/public/events/{id}/registration: PASSED - Returns fee tiers and accommodation config
backend_apis.POST /api/payments/create-order: PASSED - Returns empty razorpay_order_id when not configured

frontend_event_registration.Step 0 - Fee Overview: PASSED - Shows fee tiers table, accommodation fees, premium hotels
frontend_event_registration.Step 1 - Participant Type: PASSED - Member/Non-Member selection, phone lookup for members
frontend_event_registration.Step 2 - Details Form: PASSED - Name, email, phone fields work correctly
frontend_event_registration.Step 3 - Accommodation: PASSED - Default, Hotel, Self options with correct fees
frontend_event_registration.Step 4 - Review & Submit: PASSED - Shows 'Proceed to Payment' button when total > 0 (FIX VERIFIED)
frontend_event_registration.Step 5 - PaymentPage: PASSED - Renders correctly with UPI and Bank Transfer tabs

frontend_payment_page.UPI Tab - QR Code: PASSED - Displays QR image with correct amount (₹4000)
frontend_payment_page.UPI Tab - UTR Input: PASSED - Input field and Submit button work
frontend_payment_page.UPI Tab - UTR Submission: PASSED - Redirects to success with 'Verification Pending' status
frontend_payment_page.Bank Transfer Tab: PASSED - Shows SBI bank details (Account No, IFSC, Branch)
frontend_payment_page.Bank Transfer Tab - UTR Input: PASSED - Input field and Submit button work
frontend_payment_page.Bank Transfer Tab - UTR Submission: PASSED - Redirects to success with 'Verification Pending' status
frontend_payment_page.Razorpay Tab: PASSED - NOT displayed (correct - Razorpay not configured)

frontend_admin.Razorpay Gateway section: PASSED - Shows 'Not Configured' with red indicator
frontend_admin.Bank Accounts section: PASSED - Shows SBI account with all details editable
frontend_admin.UPI IDs section: PASSED - Shows 9486544884@pz with IDSEA Official label

iteration_9_bug_status.bug: Step 5 Payment was being skipped - went directly to success page
iteration_9_bug_status.root_cause: totalAmount computed value was 0 when handleSubmit ran the condition
iteration_9_bug_status.fix_applied: handleSubmit now uses server response total_amount (reg.total_amount) for redirect check
iteration_9_bug_status.verification: FIXED - Button shows 'Proceed to Payment', Step 5 PaymentPage renders correctly

note_on_upi_id: The UPI ID in database is 9486544884@pz (IDSEA Official), not idsea@sbi as mentioned in test request. This is the actual configured UPI ID.
